mapper.sql: order_detail_id, goods_id, goods_pic, goods_name, goods_price, goods_count, goods_total, attribute_detail_id, attribute_detail_name, pay_total, order_id, sort, status, isnotrate
mapper.select: select order_detail_id, goods_id, goods_pic, goods_name, goods_price, goods_count, goods_total, attribute_detail_id, attribute_detail_name, pay_total, order_id, sort, status, isnotrate from shop_order_detail t1 where order_detail_id=#{order_detail_id}
select count(1) from shop_order_detail where status=#{status}

select order_detail_id, goods_id, goods_pic, goods_name, goods_price, goods_count, goods_total, attribute_detail_id, attribute_detail_name, pay_total, order_id, sort, status, isnotrate from shop_order_detail t1 where order_id=#{order_id} order by sort

select a.order_detail_id, a.goods_id, substring_index(a.goods_pic, ',', 1) as goods_pic, a.goods_name, a.goods_price, a.goods_count, a.goods_total, a.attribute_detail_id, a.attribute_detail_name, a.pay_total, a.order_id, a.sort, a.status, a.isnotrate, b.goods_number from shop_order_detail a left join shop_goods b on a.goods_id = b.goods_id where a.order_id=#{order_id}
order by sort
